title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama CLI and server that lets you pull, run, and manage large language models locally.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama server, published on npm.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama, available on PyPI.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package that adds Ollama as a local LLM provider.

title: ollama-webui (Ollama-WebUI)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama with chat history, model management, and OpenAI-compatible endpoints.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library for Ollama published to Maven Central.

title: ollama-cli (node)
summary: Interactive Node-based CLI that wraps the Ollama REST API with prompts and chat sessions.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot-like VS Code extension powered by local Ollama models.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Template repo showing how to build a RAG pipeline with Ollama embeddings and LangChain.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that streams Ollama model responses into any channel.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes clusters.

title: ollama-hass
summary: Home Assistant custom component exposing Ollama as a conversation agent.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Nim wrapper for the Ollama REST API with async HTTP and native types.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing strongly-typed async client for Ollama.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET library that wraps the Ollama API with async enumerable streaming support.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama as a service for CI pipelines and dev environments.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that lets teams chat with local Ollama models via slash commands.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat UI that connects to Ollama, shows token/speed metrics and model switching.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin for local AI assistance using Ollama models inside notes.

title: ollama-zig
summary: Zig client library for Ollama with comptime JSON parsing and async I/O.
